violations.text: Single-use articles (containers & cups) were observed stored on the floor. Single-use articles must be stored at least 6 inches off the ground. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine and quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the dishwasher and 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2025
